seo_title: Photo to Sketch — Turn Photos Into Pencil Drawings Online | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Turn any photo into a sketch with LazyKiwi. Convert portraits and pictures into pencil, charcoal or ink drawings in seconds — free, realistic and shareable.

hero.title: Turn a photo into a hand-drawn sketch.
hero.description: Upload any photo and convert it into a pencil, charcoal or ink sketch in seconds. Perfect for portraits, gifts and profile art.

what_it_is.title: A drawing of you, without the artist.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi photo-to-sketch tool reinterprets your image as a hand-drawn illustration — capturing linework, shading and texture so it looks sketched by hand, not filtered.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick a sketch style
steps.description: Choose pencil, charcoal or ink and the level of detail.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Preview the result, try a few more, then download your favourite.

features.title: Linework that looks real
features.description: Edges, cross-hatching and shading are rendered like a real sketch, not a one-click filter.

features.title: Pencil, charcoal or ink
features.description: Choose the medium and detail level to match the mood — delicate portrait or bold ink.

features.title: A keepsake in seconds
features.description: Turn a favourite photo into sketch art for prints, gifts and profile pictures.

showcase.title: Photo in, sketch out
showcase.subtitle: Portraits and pictures reimagined as drawings.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the sketch actually fits. Total game changer.
quotes.name: Priya S.

faqs.question: Is photo to sketch free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a photo and convert it to a sketch for free.

faqs.question: What sketch styles are available?
faqs.answer: Pencil, charcoal and ink, with adjustable detail and shading.

faqs.question: What photo works best?
faqs.answer: A clear, well-lit photo with a strong subject converts most cleanly.

faqs.question: Can I sketch pets and objects?
faqs.answer: Yes — portraits, pets, couples and objects all work.

cta.title: Turn your photo into a hand-drawn sketch.
cta.description: Upload a photo and get a pencil, charcoal or ink drawing in seconds — free.
